title: bladegen Document
description: Complete, portable description of a bladegen design including geometry (model), per-part PBR material settings (materials), and renderer/lighting state (render). Coordinate system is Y-up; X is horizontal (guard width), Z is blade thickness. Units are scene units (dimensionless), designed to be visually consistent; typical blades are 2.5–3.6 units long.

$schema.description: Optional schema URI for tooling to validate this document. Usually set to 'schema/sword.schema.json' within this project, or an absolute URL if hosted.

version.description: Document format version (4 introduces accessories/scabbards, tassels, and material slots for them in addition to v3's blade profile and fuller upgrades).

model.description: All geometry knobs of the sword. These values generate the meshes for blade, guard, handle, pommel, and optional accessories (scabbard/tassel).

materials.description: Per-part physically based material settings applied to the generated meshes. These map to Three.js MeshPhysicalMaterial where supported.

variants.description: Optional material variants that can be exported via KHR_materials_variants.

parts.description: Subset of parts overridden by this variant.

fullerFaces.description: Per-face fuller definitions (left/right) with up to three grooves each. Converted internally into the advanced fullers array.

render.description: Renderer state and environment/lighting knobs. Independent from geometry so you can reuse looks across models.

ColorHex.description: Hex RGB color string in the form #RRGGBB (sRGB).

BladeParams.title: Blade Parameters
BladeParams.description: Controls the blade mesh along +Y (base at y≈0, tip at y≈length). Cross-section thickness is along ±Z; width is along ±X.

length.description: Blade length along +Y in scene units (base to tip). Typical 2.5–3.6.

baseWidth.description: Blade width across X at the base (y≈0), measured edge-to-edge.

tipWidth.description: Blade width across X at the tip (y≈length). May be larger or smaller than baseWidth for stylized shapes.

family.description: High-level silhouette preset. Straight is neutral, Flamberge adds edge waviness, Kris applies centerline undulation.

krisWaveCount.description: Odd centerline wave count used when family='kris'. Values are coerced to the nearest odd number.

thickness.description: Fallback overall thickness across Z if side-specific thicknessLeft/Right are omitted. Units in scene units; typical ~0.08.

curvature.description: Signed centerline curvature along the length (dimensionless). Positive bends the blade toward −X by convention; negative bends toward +X. Magnitude sets arc intensity; distribution is shaped by soriProfile/soriBias.

serrationAmplitude.description: Amplitude (scene units) of symmetric serration applied to both edges. Ignored if serrationAmplitudeLeft/Right are provided individually.

serrationFrequency.description: Number of serration cycles along the blade. Effective only when amplitude > 0.

serrationAmplitudeLeft.description: Left-edge serration amplitude (overrides serrationAmplitude for left if given).

serrationAmplitudeRight.description: Right-edge serration amplitude (overrides serrationAmplitude for right if given).

serrationSharpness.description: Sharpen serration peaks (0 = smooth sine-like, 1 = very pointy).

serrationLeanLeft.description: Lean/skew serration teeth on the left edge (-1 leans backward toward the guard, +1 leans forward toward the tip).

serrationLeanRight.description: Lean/skew serration teeth on the right edge (-1 leans backward, +1 leans forward).

fullerDepth.description: Fuller depth (legacy overlay usage). When fullerMode='overlay', controls overlay shading depth only.

fullerMode.description: none disables grooves; overlay draws visual ribbons; carve reduces blade thickness within a band across the face for a real groove.

fullerProfile.description: Carved fuller cross-profile: rounded U, sharp V, or flat-bottom.

fullerWidth.description: Approximate groove width across blade face (scene units). If 0, auto from baseWidth.

fullerInset.description: How much to push inside thickness when carving (fallback to fullerDepth if unset).

fullerLength.description: Fraction of blade length spanned by the fuller(s) (0..1).

fullerCount.description: Number of fuller grooves per face: 0, 1, 2, or 3.

sweepSegments.description: Longitudinal tessellation segments. Higher → smoother and heavier geometry.

asymmetry.description: Width bias: >0 widens right edge and narrows left; <0 widens left and narrows right.

edgeType.description: Blade edge configuration. Influences hamon auto-side selection when hamonSide='auto'.

thicknessLeft.description: Thickness across Z at left edge (overrides thickness for left).

thicknessRight.description: Thickness across Z at right edge (overrides thickness for right).

baseAngle.description: Initial tangent angle at base in radians. Positive leans the blade toward +X linearly with Y (independent from curvature).

soriProfile.description: Curvature distribution profile: 'torii' (balanced), 'koshi' (closer to base), 'saki' (closer to tip).

soriBias.description: Bias exponent for curvature distribution; >1 pushes curvature peak toward the selected soriProfile region.

kissakiLength.description: Fraction (0..0.35) of blade reserved for the tip segment (kissaki). 0 disables special tip segment shaping.

kissakiRoundness.description: Easing of tip taper within the kissaki segment (0 = sharp, 1 = very round).

tipRampStart.description: Normalized distance (0..0.98) along the blade where the taper toward the tip begins. Values above 0 hold the blade at baseWidth until the final segment.

hamonEnabled.description: Enable hamon (tempering line) visual overlays along edge(s).

hamonWidth.description: Hamon band width in scene units measured inward from the edge (visual overlay parameter).

hamonAmplitude.description: Waviness amplitude of hamon along the edge (visual overlay).

hamonSide.description: Which edge(s) get a hamon overlay. 'auto' picks the thinner side when edgeType='single'; both sides when 'double'.

serrationSeed.description: Seed used by random serration pattern.

twistAngle.description: Total twist around +Y (radians) from base to tip. Positive = right-handed twist. Generous range (±12π).

crossSection.description: Transverse profile family. Compound blends primary and secondary bevels with a shallow web ridge.

bevel.description: Profile sharpness control (0..1). For diamond/lenticular/hexagonal, higher values increase center thickness relative to edges.

tipShape.description: High-level tip shaping. 'leaf' can add a mid-blade bulge via tipBulge.

tipBulge.description: For tipShape='leaf': additional symmetric width bulge across the blade (0..1).

align.description: Horizontal alignment for text engravings. Ignored for non-text types.

letterSpacing.description: Extra spacing between characters in multiples of height (em-like). 0 = normal.

thicknessProfile.description: Distal taper profile along blade length. Uses piecewise-linear [t, scale] pairs with t in [0..1] (base2192tip) and scale multiplying thicknessLeft/Right at that row. Defaults to a flat 1.0 profile if omitted.1, scale multiplies thicknessLeft/Right).

curveProfile.description: Optional multi-point lateral centerline offsets for complex blade curvature.

mode.description: absolute offsets are scene units; relative offsets are multiplied by blade length.

scale.description: Additional multiplier applied to the sampled offsets.

widthProfile.description: Optional outline width adjustments along the blade length.

mode.description: scale multiplies the generated width; absolute overrides with scene-unit values.

ricassoLength.description: Unsharpened base length fraction (0..0.3). Within this region the blade keeps parallel sides (base width) and suppresses serrations.

falseEdgeLength.description: False edge (swedge) length fraction from the tip (0..1). Applied on the spine side toward the point.

falseEdgeDepth.description: Spine bevel reduction amount (scene units) when false edge is active; fades in along the specified length.

waviness.description: Optional oscillation profile used for flamberge/kris silhouettes. Applies sine-based offset along the span.

amplitude.description: Lateral displacement magnitude in scene units.

frequency.description: Number of oscillations (cycles) along the blade length.

taper.description: Exponent controlling how quickly the wave fades toward the tip (0 = no fade).

offset.description: Static centerline offset added after the wave, in scene units.

mode.description: Determines whether the oscillation shifts the centerline, modulates width, or both.

hollowGrind.description: Concave grind shaping applied to each face, reducing thickness toward the edge for straight razors or hollow-ground blades.

enabled.description: Toggle for hollow grind shaping (mix defaults provided when true).

mix.description: Blend factor between the procedural cross-section and the hollow grind target.

depth.description: Relative carve depth toward the spine (0 shallow, 1 aggressive).

radius.description: Controls curvature of the concave profile; smaller values focus the carve near edges.

bias.description: Bias concavity toward the edges (+) or spine (−).

fullers.description: Advanced groove definitions per face with explicit offsets, spans, and profiles. Replaces fullerCount/fullER* knobs when supplied.

side.description: Which blade face receives the groove; 'both' mirrors across the spine.

offsetFromSpine.description: Lateral offset from the spine centerline (scene units). Positive offsets move toward +X.

depth.description: Visual depth used for overlay rendering (scene units).

inset.description: Physical inset applied when mode='carve'. Defaults to depth when omitted.

start.description: Normalized start position along blade length (0 at base).

end.description: Normalized end position along blade length (must exceed start).

mode.description: Render mode: overlay draws additive geometry, carve removes thickness in the primary mesh.

taper.description: Linear taper amount shrinking width/depth toward the end (0 none, 1 full taper).

GuardParams.title: Guard Parameters
GuardParams.description: Controls cross-guard geometry. 'bar' uses a box; 'disk' is a thin coin; 'winged'/'claw' are mirrored extrudes with optional asymmetry.

width.description: Guard span along X. For style='disk' this is the disk diameter (≈2×radius).

thickness.description: Thickness/extrude depth. For disk this becomes coin thickness (clamped internally).

curve.description: Vertical curvature of the wing/claw arms (−1..1). Positive bends upward (+Y), negative downward.

tilt.description: Rotation around Z (radians). Applies to all styles, including disk (tsuba tilt).

style.description: Guard style preset: rectangular bar, curved wing, pointy claw, circular disk (tsuba), basket shell, knuckle bow, swept hilt, or cup/shell guard.

curveSegments.description: 2D curve tessellation for extruded styles (winged/claw). Higher → smoother and heavier.

habakiEnabled.description: Add a rectangular habaki (blade collar) immediately above the guard.

habakiMargin.description: Extra clearance around the blade for the habaki (X/Z padding).

heightOffset.description: Offset along Y relative to the blade base (y=0) to position the guard up or down the tang.

quillonCount.description: Number of quillons (side arms): commonly 0 or 2; 4 adds an extra pair offset along Y.

quillonLength.description: Quillon length along ±X. Tip length scales with tipSharpness (≈length×0.25×tipSharpness).

ornamentation.description: Stylization factor (0..1) that increases quillon radius/faceting subtly.

tipSharpness.description: Continuously controls quillon tip cone sharpness (0 blunt → 1 sharp).

cutoutCount.description: For style='disk': number of radial cutouts (holes). 0 disables.

cutoutRadius.description: For style='disk': cutout radius as a fraction of disk radius (0.1–0.8).

asymmetricArms.description: Enable left/right scale asymmetry for winged/claw arms.

asymmetry.description: Wing/claw scale bias across X when asymmetricArms=true. Positive scales right larger, left smaller; negative inverses it.

guardBlendFillet.description: Adds a small bridging piece between blade base and guard (0..1). Purely cosmetic; size scales with value.

basketRodCount.description: For style='basket': number of radial rods forming the cage.

basketRodRadius.description: For style='basket': radius of each rod (tube) in scene units.

basketRingCount.description: For style='basket': number of rim rings to add (0..2).

basketRingRadiusAdd.description: For style='basket': additional radius added to the base ring radius for rim rings.

basketRingThickness.description: For style='basket': minor radius of the torus used for rim rings.

shellCoverage.description: For style='shell': coverage fraction of a hemisphere (0.3 shallow cup → 1 full hemisphere).

shellThickness.description: For style='shell': depth scale multiplier applied along Y (1 uses guard thickness).

shellFlare.description: For style='shell': stretch factor along Z for an ovalized shell.

pasDaneCount.description: Number of pas d'âne (finger) rings attached near the guard (0..2).

pasDaneThickness.description: Pas d'âne torus minor radius (ring thickness).

pasDaneOffsetY.description: Vertical offset for pas d'âne rings relative to the guard top.

width.description: Langet width across the blade flat (X).

chamfer.description: Optional edge chamfer factor for langets (0..0.5).

guardBlendFilletStyle.description: Fillet style for guard↔blade bridge: 'box' = rectangular block; 'smooth' = rounded collar (elliptical cylinder).

HandleParams.title: Handle Parameters
HandleParams.description: Lathed handle centered around Y with optional helical wrap deformation, oval cross-section, and visible tang overlay.

length.description: Handle length along Y. The guard sits at y≈0; the pommel attaches at the lower end (−Y).

radiusTop.description: Top radius at y=0 (near guard) before deformations.

radiusBottom.description: Bottom radius at y=−length before deformations.

segmentation.description: Add axial ridges along the grip profile.

wrapEnabled.description: Enable helical wrap (geometric) deformation around the handle surface.

wrapTurns.description: Number of helical cycles from top to bottom when wrapEnabled=true.

wrapDepth.description: Radial amplitude of the wrap deformation (scene units).

phiSegments.description: Radial tessellation of the lathe (higher → smoother).

wrapTexture.description: Apply a procedural diagonal stripe texture to the handle's material (visual only).

wrapTexScale.description: Procedural wrap texture repeat scale when wrapTexture=true.

wrapTexAngle.description: Stripe angle in radians for the procedural wrap texture.

wrapStyle.description: Preset wrap geometry overlay (independent of wrapEnabled deformation).

scale.description: Thickness offset applied to the rayskin overlay (scene units).

intensity.description: Visual tint intensity multiplier for the rayskin material.

ovalRatio.description: Ovalization ratio (X stretch vs Z squash) after lathe and wrap. 1 = circular cross-section.

segmentationCount.description: Number of ridge cycles when segmentation=true.

flare.description: Extra radius added toward the pommel end (tapers quadratically toward bottom).

curvature.description: Slight bend of the handle along X as a quadratic function of Y (visual ergonomics).

tangVisible.description: Render a rectangular tang (blade extension) through the handle as a separate overlay mesh.

tangWidth.description: Tang overlay width across X when tangVisible=true.

tangThickness.description: Tang overlay thickness across Z when tangVisible=true.

menukiPreset.description: Preset menuki placement. Ignored when explicit menuki array is provided.

PommelParams.title: Pommel Parameters
PommelParams.description: Pommel geometry attached at the lower handle end. Disk is oriented like a coin (faces ⟂ Y). Elongation is ignored for disk style.

size.description: Base size radius for orb/disk/spike styles (scene units).

elongation.description: Scale factor along Y for non-disk styles (orb/spike). Disk style remains flat regardless.

style.description: Pommel style: spherical orb, flat disk coin, tapered spike, wheel, scent-stopper, lanyard ring, crown, or fishtail with flared wings.

shapeMorph.description: Style-dependent morph factor (e.g., squash/stretch for orb; rim flare for disk; slenderness for spike).

offsetX.description: Lateral offset along X from handle axis (for stylized balance).

offsetY.description: Offset along Y relative to handle bottom.

spikeLength.description: Multiplier for spike height when style='spike'.

balance.description: Auto-balance toward blade mass (0 = exact size, 1 = fully auto-sized by crude mass estimate).

wheelFaceBevel.description: Visual bevel amount for wheel-style pommel (currently cosmetic).

crownSpikes.description: Number of spikes for crown-style pommel.

crownSharpness.description: Sharpness factor for crown-style spike height.

peenVisible.description: Render a visible peen or peen block atop the pommel.

peenShape.description: Peen shape: rounded dome or rectangular block.

SwordParams.title: Sword Parameters
SwordParams.description: Grouping of all per-part geometry parameters used to synthesize the sword meshes.

accessories.description: Accessory geometry such as scabbards and tassels.

hiltEnabled.description: When false, omit guard, handle and pommel to render a blade-only model.

guardEnabled.description: When false, omit only the guard while keeping handle and pommel.

useRatios.description: When true, derive guard/handle/pommel sizes from blade length using ratios.

AccessoriesParams.title: Accessories Parameters
AccessoriesParams.description: Accessory companions such as scabbards and tassels rendered alongside the sword.

ScabbardParams.title: Scabbard Parameters
ScabbardParams.description: Controls the companion scabbard sheath that follows the blade profile.

bodyMargin.description: Extra clearance added around the blade width (scene units).

bodyThickness.description: Overall thickness of the sheath across ±Z.

tipExtension.description: Fraction of blade length the scabbard extends beyond the tip.

throatLength.description: Mouth/throat collar length as a fraction of blade length.

throatScale.description: Scale multiplier applied across the throat segment.

locketOffset.description: Offset from the mouth to position the locket band (fraction of blade length).

locketLength.description: Length of the locket band swell (fraction of blade length).

locketScale.description: Scale multiplier for the locket swell.

chapeLength.description: Fraction of the scabbard body tapered into the chape tip.

chapeScale.description: Width/thickness multiplier at the chape tip.

bodyRoundness.description: Blend between hard-edged (0) and round (1) scabbard cross-section.

offsetX.description: Lateral offset applied to the scabbard centerline.

hangAngle.description: Rotation about Z in radians giving the scabbard a hanging cant.

TasselParams.title: Tassel Parameters
TasselParams.description: Controls the decorative tassel or sword knot.

anchorOffset.description: Normalized offset along the scabbard when attachTo='scabbard'.

length.description: Total rope length expressed as a fraction of blade length.

droop.description: Vertical sag factor (0 taut, 1 fully drooped).

tuftSize.description: Radius of the tassel fringe bundle.

MaterialState.title: Material State
MaterialState.description: Physically based material values per part (MeshPhysicalMaterial-like). Colors are sRGB hex. Bump is procedural noise; scale is in scene units.

preset.description: Friendly label for a preset (e.g., 'Steel', 'Leather'). Non-normative; does not change validation.

bumpEnabled.description: Enable procedural noise bump mapping on the part.

bumpScale.description: Bump height scale in scene units (visual normal perturbation depth).

bumpSeed.description: Seed for procedural noise (deterministic bump pattern).

anisotropyRotation.description: Anisotropy direction in radians (0 aligns with +X tangent).

RenderState.title: Render State
RenderState.description: Renderer, environment, and post-processing parameters. Values map to Three.js renderer, lights, and post passes.

bgBrightness.description: Linear blend toward a lighter background color (0..1).

keyAz.description: Key light azimuth angle in degrees.

keyEl.description: Key light elevation angle in degrees.

envAsBackground.description: Use environment map as scene background when true.

envMapIntensity.description: Global environment map intensity multiplier applied to materials that support it.

fogDensity.description: Fog density for FogExp2. 0 disables fog.
